title: Lead Information Security Engineer
skills: Security Compliance, Continuous Integration, Kubernetes, Ci/Cd, Tools, Docker, Ansible, Cloud, Scripting, Coding, GraphQL, Scripting Languages, Progra
key_skills: Security Compliance, Continuous Integration, Kubernetes, Ci/Cd, Tools, Docker, Ansible, Cloud, Scripting, Coding, GraphQL, Scripting Languages, Programming, CD, Python, Github, Cloud Security, Microsoft Azure, Amazon Ec2, As, Framework, Lambda Expressions, Management, Infrastructure, Terraform, AWS
job_description:
Job Description
Additional Information
Qualifications
At least 8 Years of practical experience in developing customized rules for Cloud Security Posture Management.
Proven experience with Wiz.
Strong proficiency in scripting languages including Python and PowerShell.
Proficiency with GitHub and CI/CD processes.
Strong understanding of security compliance frameworks and cloud security services.
Responsibilities
What Makes This Opportunity Unique
At Principal Financial Group, we prioritize creating an extraordinary environment where our employees can excel. As a Lead Information Security Engineer based in HYDERABAD, you'll be a key figure in cloud security, ensuring smooth performance and high-reaching expansion. You'll become part of our “Network Vulnerability Management & Configuration Management” Team, charged with writing custom CSPM misconfiguration rules and providing support/ guidance to our stakeholders in addressing misconfigurations/CSPM within our public cloud infrastructure. This is your opportunity to give significantly to the security foundation of our worldwide operations!
Cloud Security Posture Management
Must have Cloud Security Posture Management (CSPM) - Use tools to discover assets in cloud infrastructure to identify and continuously monitor for security vulnerabilities and misconfigurations
Must have Experience in scripting languages such as Python (required), PowerShell etc.
Must have Programming/Scripting competency with Infrastructure-as-Code (IaC) using Terraform (Preferred) or Ansible
Must have hands-on experience on using Rego Policy and/ or GraphQL
Must have Proficiency with GitHub, as well as Continuous Integration/ Continuous Deployment (CI/CD) processes.
Collaborate with developers across the organization to manage Cloud Security Posture Management to reduce threats.
Hands-on experience with CSPM tools like Wiz (preferred) or Prisma Cloud (good to have) and the ability to create custom rules as per business requirements.
Understanding of native cloud solutions like EC2’s, Containers, Lambda’s, Docker, containers, Kubernetes, VDIs, cloud storage, cloud infrastructure, etc. And other cloud security services like Load Balancer, VPC Flow Logs, EKS, Lambda, and WAFs.
Good to have hands on experience on SSPM (SaaS Security Posture Management) tools
Hands-on experience in AWS (preferred) and Azure (good to have)
Candidate should have AWS Cloud Practioner certification (CCP). AWS Cloud Security Specialty certification is a plus.
Qualifications
Required Skills & Experience
Strong hands-on experience with Cloud Security Posture Management (CSPM).
Proficiency in Python (required); experience in PowerShell is a plus.
Experience with Terraform (preferred) or Ansible
Practical experience creating rules using Rego and/or working with GraphQL.
Strong knowledge of GitHub and CI/CD processes.
Hands-on expertise with CSPM tools such as Wiz (preferred) or Prisma Cloud (good to have).
Solid understanding of cloud-native services (AWS preferred; Azure good to have).
View more
Quick apply
Applied

title: Head - Platform Services (10-18 yrs)
skills: IT Change Management, IT Program Management, IT Transformation, ITIL, IT Project Management, IT Infrastructure
key_skills: IT Change Management, IT Program Management, IT Transformation, ITIL, IT Project Management, IT Infrastructure
job_description:
Job Description
Essential Duties and Responsibilities :
1. Define and lead the strategic vision and roadmap for platform services, aligning with organizational objectives, technology strategy, and compliance requirements.
2. Drive continuous innovation and improvement through adoption of modern technologies, best practices, and emerging trends.
3. Build and maintain strong stakeholder relationships across business, technology, and external partners to ensure alignment and collaboration.
4. Lead enterprise-wide change management initiatives to enable adoption of new platforms, tools, and agile ways of working.
5. Establish and monitor KPIs and performance metrics to evaluate platform effectiveness and drive data-driven optimization.
6. Define and execute strategy for middleware and messaging platforms, ensuring scalability, reliability, security, and seamless integration.
7. Oversee design, development, and lifecycle management of platform solutions, ensuring interoperability and high performance.
8. Lead observability and monitoring strategy to enhance system visibility, availability, and operational resilience.
9. Drive automation and RPA initiatives to streamline processes, improve efficiency, and reduce manual intervention.
10. Oversee enterprise platform solutions including ServiceNow, ensuring effective development, integration, customization, and optimization.
11. Lead testing automation and quality engineering initiatives, embedding continuous testing practices throughout the development lifecycle.
12. Partner with business-aligned technology teams to ensure platform adoption, scalability, and alignment with business objectives.
13. Promote DevSecOps and shift-left practices, integrating security, compliance, and quality early in the development lifecycle.
14. Enhance developer experience through improved tooling, workflows, and productivity-driven platform capabilities.
15. Ensure strong governance, risk management, and regulatory compliance across platform services in collaboration with audit and risk teams.
Required Qualifications :
1. Bachelors degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, or a related field, or equivalent experience.
2. Extensive leadership experience in enterprise IT environments, with a focus on platform engineering, middleware, automation, and workflow technologies.
3. Proven expertise in designing and managing enterprise platform services across complex technology landscapes.
4. Strong knowledge of ITIL practices and service delivery models.
5. Demonstrated success in driving technology adoption, transformation, and change management in large organizations.
6. Deep technical knowledge across middleware, observability, automation platforms, and enterprise systems.
7. Strong leadership, communication, and stakeholder management skills with the ability to influence at all levels.
8. Strategic mindset with a focus on innovation, operational excellence, and customer-centric outcomes.
Preferred Qualifications :
1. Advanced degree in a relevant field.
2. Experience in training, coaching, and driving capability development within teams.
3. Relevant certifications or exposure to ITIL, DevSecOps, or enterprise platform frameworks.
4. Strong executive-level communication and presentation capabilities.
5. Experience working in environments integrating Service Management and SRE practices.
6. Exposure to complex, multi-platform enterprise technology ecosystems.
View more
Apply on iimjobs.com
Apply attempted
match_reason: Strong match on platform/cloud/DevOps skills and Hyderabad location, with good experience alignment for a senior platform leadership role; however compensation is undisclosed and the role leans more toward ITIL/change/program management than the candidate’s core hands-on Azure/DevOps profile.
